Lesson 9 Summary Guide
 Important to have multiple traffic sources leading to your
squeeze page…don’t rely on only one traffic source
 Research and identify what types of squeeze pages your
competitors are using
 Test different types of squeeze pages
Example: Headline, video, opt-in box, cop

© 2012 Internet Alchemy, Inc.

v.1
 Capture the email address in the opt-in box
o Studies show the more fields you ask them to complete,
the lower your conversion rate will be
o Including the “Name” field will work well and personalize
the emails in some niches, so really market-dependent
o In more “jaded and cynical” markets like the IM or online
dating space, people will often give fictional or fake
names
